title: Latest News from Science Magazine
description: Keyword search result for Alerts: News Weekly Headlines -- New results matching your keyword search query (updated daily).

items.title: BREAKING: WHO declares major outbreak of rare Ebola virus species in Congo and Uganda an international emergency
items.description: No vaccines or treatments exist for Ebola Bundibugyo, which has caused hundreds of suspected cases and 80 deaths; WHO warns of "potentially much larger outbreak"

items.title: CDC plan to retire lab monkeys to Texas sanctuary draws ire
items.description: Critics say proposal was rushed and could endanger the animals

items.title: Rare seals spotted snoozing in an underwater ‘bubble cave’
items.description: Hidden chambers may provide Mediterranean monk seals refuge from tourists

items.title: Murder, monsters, occupational hazards: Why movie geologists die so often
items.description: Cinematic geologists are usually good guys—sometimes gals—but they have a one in three fatality rate, a film analysis show

items.title: Making eyes ‘photosynthetic’ could treat common vision problem
items.description: Relocating plants’ light-capturing structures to the eye may fight damage from dry eye

items.title: Chinese-European mission to reveal shape of Earth’s magnetic shield
items.description: SMILE orbiter will use x-rays to map how the solar wind batters the magnetosphere

items.title: In unreleased document, fired U.S. science board issues stark warning about keeping pace with China
items.description: The National Science Board urges robust response to China’s rise in cover letter to its biennial report on the global research enterprise

items.title: Did this scientist go too far trying to save Ecuador’s wildlife?
items.description: Alejandro Arteaga’s efforts to identify and protect tropical reptiles and amphibians have entangled him in controversy

items.title: Molecules emerge as a new kind of building block for quantum computers
items.description: Storing quantum information in designer molecules could hold advantages over atoms, ions, and other kinds of qubits

items.title: Boy’s brain tumor tied to gene therapy
items.description: Researchers report first cancer caused by virus widely used to deliver genes, but say risk is low
